title: Armor, Ores, and More
description: Adds more ores, tools, and armor to Minecraft
body:
CAUTION: IF YOU HAVE A WORLD THAT HAS USED ANY VERSIONS BELOW 1.1.1, USE 1.1.1 OR ABOVE AT YOUR OWN RISK! VERSIONS ABOVE 1.1.0 USE A DIFFERENT MOD ID WHICH CAN CORRUPT YOUR WORLD!

Exactly what it says on the tin.

Have you ever wanted more materials, armor sets, and tools in Minecraft? Well, have no fear, this mod is here! Admittedly, there isn't much right now, but more ores will be added in the future. Currently, the mod contains:

- Amethyst tools and armor
- Emerald tools and armor
- Mineable tin
- Bronze (made by combining copper and tin) tools and armor
- Redstone tools and armor
- Ruby ore, tools, and armor
- Overpoweredium ore, tools, and armor
- Enderite ore, tools, armor

If you have any ideas for ores I can add, feel free to leave a comment, and I might add it in the next update.
